---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to see. (For a new agent tool, see CONTRIBUTING.md §"Adding a new agent tool".)

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context
Anything else (links, examples, mockups).
